response:
| Pros | Cons |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Increased flexibility** — Employees can often set their own schedules and better manage personal responsibilities alongside work. | **Feelings of isolation** — Lack of daily face-to-face interaction with colleagues can lead to loneliness and disconnection from team culture. |
| **Cost and time savings** — No commute reduces transportation expenses and frees up hours that would otherwise be spent traveling. | **Communication barriers** — Collaborating across time zones and relying solely on digital tools can slow decision-making and cause misunderstandings. |
| **Wider talent access** — Companies can hire the best candidates regardless of location, and workers can access jobs beyond their local area. | **Blurred work-life boundaries** — The home becomes the office, making it harder to "switch off" and increasing the risk of burnout. |
